overall.description: A continuous forward-moving shot through the North Oak district in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a shallow reflecting pool with a large hillside sign, transitioning through grassy overgrown terrain, and ending on a paved urban street with futuristic skyscrapers. The footage showcases high-fidelity ray-traced water reflections and golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow reflecting pool with palm tree island

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the large North Oak sign on the hillside

entered.detail: shallow water surface with ripples and reflections of palm trees
dense grouping of palm trees on a small island in the water
large white sculptural sign reading North Oak on the hillside
reddish-brown rocky terrain with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through a shallow reflecting pool toward a palm tree island. The large white North Oak sign is visible on the hillside ahead, backlit by bright morning sun. Rocky terrain frames the left side while clear blue skies dominate above.

events.description: exits shallow water onto grassy terrain at the base of the hill
camera tilts upward to frame the North Oak sign against the bright sky

agents.ego_description: climbing the grassy slope past the base of the North Oak sign

entered.detail: overgrown wild grass and vegetation covering the ground
distant cluster of futuristic skyscrapers becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Leaving the water behind, the camera ascends a grassy hillside covered in tall vegetation. The North Oak sign looms larger as the camera approaches its base, while the futuristic city skyline first becomes visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban edge with city backdrop

events.description: dense futuristic cityscape with neon billboards becomes fully visible

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass toward the urban street with increasing visibility of the city

entered.detail: modern building with prominent green softsys signage
holographic advertising displays on building facades
derelict car parked on the roadside ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera crests the hill revealing the full futuristic cityscape. The softsys building dominates the left side with its green neon signage, while the terrain transitions from grass to dirt. An abandoned vehicle and street furniture become visible as the camera approaches the paved road.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with commercial buildings

events.description: transitions from grassy terrain onto paved asphalt city street
pedestrians and parked vehicles become visible along the roadside

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street approaching a small group of pedestrians near a parked car

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near a parked vehicle

entered.detail: large digital advertisement display on the right side of the street
red and white striped barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera steps onto the asphalt street of the North Oak district, surrounded by futuristic commercial buildings. A few pedestrians walk ahead near parked vehicles, while advertising billboards and street furniture line the road. The scene transitions from natural overgrowth to full urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement that transforms a serene, natural landscape into a dense futuristic cityscape. It begins by gliding through a shallow reflecting pool toward a palm tree island, with a large white North Oak sign backlit by the morning sun on a rocky hillside. As the camera leaves the water, it ascends a grassy slope covered in tall vegetation, causing the hillside sign to loom larger while the distant city skyline first emerges to the left. The scene then opens as the camera crests the hill, shifting from grass to dirt and revealing the towering Softsys building with its green neon signage alongside abandoned vehicles. Finally, the terrain transitions into full urban infrastructure as the camera steps onto a paved asphalt street lined with commercial buildings, advertising billboards, and pedestrians.
